jp.title: 一生刑務所の可能性 容疑者夫婦の「生後7カ月の赤ちゃん」の今後は？弁護士が解説「一時的に児童相談所で保護されているが…」 栃木強盗殺人
jp.description: 栃木県上三川町で会社役員の富山英子さん（69）が殺害された強盗殺人事件で、すでに逮捕された指示役の夫婦に加え、警察はさらに上位の立場から事件に関与した疑いがあるとして益田和彦容疑者を公開手配した。

jp.title: MSI、COMPUTEX 2026でAIインフラ全戦略を公開｜液冷データセンターからエッジ現場まで一気通貫
jp.description: MSIがCOMPUTEX 2026で、液冷AIサーバーからデスクサイド開発機、エッジAIスーパーコンピューターまでを統合したエンタープライズAI戦略を発表。NVIDIA MGX・DGX Spark・DGX Stationを三層で組み合わせ、製造・農業・交通・EV充電インフラへの産業応用を展開する。

jp.title: 「日本人ファースト」が生むものは 社会に広がる新たな排外主義
jp.description: 「ヘイトスピーチ解消法」が施行されて6月3日で10年となる。在日外国人の排斥を訴える路上での露骨なヘイトスピーチが減った一方で、インターネット上の差別的な書き込みがなくなる気配はない。

jp.title: 【台風6号】東京に線状降水帯の可能性 予想雨量、注意すべき時間帯は
jp.description: 台風6号は3日、東京都に接近する見込みで、線状降水帯が発生して大雨災害発生の危険度が急激に高まる可能性がある。予想雨量、風の強さ、注意すべきポイントを気象庁の情報を基にまとめた。【最終更新】6月3日 07:45台風6号、東京都に最接近いつ台風6号は、6月3日午前3時時点で田辺市の南西約40キロにあり、1時間におよそ40キロの速さで東北東へ進んでいる。

world.title: Outrage grows in Britain after footage shows dying stabbing victim handcuffed by police
world.description: Video shows an 18-year-old stabbing victim handcuffed by police after his attacker falsely accused him of racial abuse. Protesters clashed with officers in Southampton following the killer's sentencing.

world.title: RM23mil raised to build Sepang Chinese school
world.description: A TOTAL of RM23mil has been raised for the construction and development of a Chinese vernacular primary school in Sepang, Selangor, through a fundraising concert attended by 600 guests.

world.title: Emergency warning system could be operational next year
world.description: A system capable of sending emergency public warnings to mobile phones is set to take a step forward.

world.title: Government moves to amend Water Act, restructure ZINWA
world.description: THE government has proposed amendments to the Water Act and the Zimbabwe National Water Authority (ZINWA) Act as part of efforts to align the country’s water management laws with the Constitution. Speaking during the post-cabinet media briefing on Tuesday, Information Minister Soda Zhemu said cabinet had considered and noted the principles for the amendment of […]

world.title: Government unveils new Youth Policy targeting unemployment, drug abuse
world.description: ZIMBABWE has unveiled a new National Youth Policy for the period 2026-2030 aimed at tackling challenges affecting young people, including unemployment, drug and substance abuse. The National Youth Policy 2026-2030 replaces the 2020-2025 framework, which championed initiatives such as the Youth Service in Zimbabwe Programme, the launch of the Youth Fund and the establishment of […]

world.title: Whoever wins, wins – Mnangagwa tells disgruntled retired army generals, senior civil servants as Constitutional Amendment Bill is tabled in Parliament
world.description: PRESIDENT Emmerson Mnangagwa has smugly challenged disgruntled, retired military generals and former senior civil servants, telling them ‘Whoever wins, wins’ in ongoing Constitutional Amendment Bill No. 3 contestations.

world.title: Palace, BI: P480 Traveler Fee Still Under Review
world.description: Under the Civil Aviation and Immigration Security Services project, arriving or departing international travelers will be charged $4 or P240 for a one-way flight or P480 for a round-trip.
